title: Last Call (Ginivex-class)

'''''Last Call''''' was a modified [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]] given to [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] by [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] following the theft of her previous such [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] on [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. The creation of these personal Fanblade fighters proved exceedingly expensive for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], and Dooku was known to begrudge having to replace Ventress's vessels.

''Last Call'' was equipped with the latest [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] technology, as well as a prototype "[[gemcutter]]" stolen from [[Carbanti United Electronics/Legends|Carbanti United Electronics]], a device which detected the space-time disturbance caused by a ship about to enter or leave [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and gave the pilot approximately five seconds warning of other ships incoming or making the jump to lightspeed. The fighter was also fitted with external modules capable of carrying up to eighteen [[A-series assassin droid|Confederacy assassin droids]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Ventress held a captive [[Palleus Chuff]] onboard ''Last Call'' while she set out to track down [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] before his meeting with Dooku on [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]]. Chuff managed to escape, and set the starfighter to self-destruct on [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]], forcing Ventress to find another means of reaching Vjun.
